ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "estimated_recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of recovery */,
  "actual_recovery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of recovery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., ongoing, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
Description of the role and its permissions
City where the team is based
State where the team is based
Unique identifier for the home team
Unique identifier for the away team
Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired)
Unique identifier for each injury record
Status of the injury (e.g., ongoing, recovered)
